message:
fix: Improve float handling - NaN strings, floor/ceil, assertions

- Fix float('-nan') codegen to produce -std.math.nan(f64)
- Fix pythonFloatRepr to format exponents with 2 digits (e-05 not e-5)
- Fix str(float) to use formatFloat for proper NaN handling
- Add pythonEql helper for identity-based NaN comparison in assertIn
- Fix floatAsIntegerRatio to return error for NaN/Inf
- Fix round() to raise OverflowError for extreme values
- Add missing underscore modules to runtime_files in compiler
